requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 Evidence for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量——光伏逆变器IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質——光伏逆變器IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據

summary.en: For Uganda PV inverter projects, EMC evidence should be aligned to IEC 62920 for photovoltaic power conversion equipment and the applicable IEC 61000-series emissions, immunity, harmonic, and flicker tests requested by the utility, project owner, or UNBS/PVoC conformity assessment route. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment. Grid-connected systems should also show that EMC and harmonic performance is compatible with Uganda's 50 Hz, 240/415 V network and the connection agreement.
summary.zh: 乌干达光伏逆变器项目的EMC证据应对齐IEC 62920光伏功率变换设备要求，以及公用事业、项目业主或UNBS/PVoC合格评定路径要求的适用IEC 61000系列发射、抗扰度、谐波和闪变测试。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准。并网系统还应证明EMC和谐波性能与乌干达50 Hz、240/415 V网络及接入协议兼容。
summary.zht: 烏干達光伏逆變器項目的EMC證據應對齊IEC 62920光伏功率轉換設備要求，以及公用事業、項目業主或UNBS/PVoC合格評定路徑要求的適用IEC 61000系列發射、抗擾度、諧波和閃變測試。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準。併網系統還應證明EMC和諧波性能與烏干達50 Hz、240/415 V網路及接入協議相容。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits, including harmonics and flicker where applicable
UNBS PVoC conformity assessment for electrical and electronic goods including solar equipment

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports may include EMC and electrical-performance tests but should not be assumed to cover IEC 62920 or the exact IEC 61000 limits and configurations requested for a Ugandan project.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依据GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及CNAS认可实验室测试报告。这些报告可能包括EMC和电气性能测试，但不应假定其覆盖IEC 62920或乌干达项目要求的具体IEC 61000限值和配置。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依據GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及CNAS認可實驗室測試報告。這些報告可能包括EMC和電氣性能測試，但不應假定其覆蓋IEC 62920或烏干達項目要求的具體IEC 61000限值和配置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T EMC reports are not automatically IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 evidence for Uganda. Exporters should map each Chinese EMC test clause to the requested IEC clause, identify missing emissions, immunity, harmonic, or flicker tests, and confirm whether retesting is needed for the model, firmware, power rating, enclosure, cabling, and Uganda voltage configuration.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T EMC报告不会自动成为乌干达IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据。出口商应将每项中国EMC测试条款映射至所要求的IEC条款，识别缺失的发射、抗扰度、谐波或闪变测试，并确认是否需针对型号、固件、功率等级、外壳、布线和乌干达电压配置重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T EMC報告不會自動成為烏干達IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據。出口商應將每項中國EMC測試條款映射至所要求的IEC條款，識別缺失的發射、抗擾度、諧波或閃變測試，並確認是否需針對型號、韌體、功率等級、外殼、佈線和烏干達電壓配置重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when requested by UNBS/PVoC conformity assessment, ERA or utility project review, the connection agreement, or the project owner; otherwise a core technical due-diligence item for PV inverter acceptance.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese EMC evidence may satisfy Chinese domestic certification or procurement expectations but is not automatically accepted as Uganda IEC evidence.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not submit a China GB/T EMC certificate as a drop-in substitute for IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 evidence. Build a clause map, close missing EMC and harmonic tests, and confirm the required test configuration with UNBS, the utility engineer, or the project owner before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国GB/T EMC证书直接作为IEC 62920或IEC 61000证据的替代文件提交。应建立条款映射，补齐缺失的EMC和谐波测试，并在出货前与UNBS、公用事业工程师或项目业主确认所需测试配置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國GB/T EMC證書直接作為IEC 62920或IEC 61000證據的替代文件提交。應建立條款映射，補齊缺失的EMC和諧波測試，並在出貨前與UNBS、公用事業工程師或項目業主確認所需測試配置。
